Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x8009 "JUMPMANJUNIOR-07E1-8009" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 jsr $07e1 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Jumpman Junior.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $07E1 to set the datasette buffer pointer at $B2/B3 to zero to prevent crashing when starting a game. Added a new routine at $82B8 which masks out bit 7 (current raster line bit 8) when setting bit 4 (DEN bit) in $D011. This prevents getting stuck on the high score entry screen on a PAL machine. Patched $A90C from JSR $8BCB to JSR $82B8 to use the new $D011 DEN bit setting routine.
